page_content:
flowchart LR
    subgraph Client
        BROWSER[React SPA Frontend]
    end

    subgraph Infra[Docker And Dev Environment]
        GATEWAY[YARP API Gateway ASP.NET Core Reverse Proxy]

        subgraph Services[Backend Microservices Net 8]
            AUTH[Auth Service JWT Issuance]
            USER[User Service Profile]
            PRODUCT[Product Service Catalog And Inventory]
            ORDER[Order Service Order Orchestration]
            PAYMENT[Payment Service Wallet And Charges]
        end

        subgraph Data[SQL Server Container]
            DBA[(authdb)]
            DBP[(productdb)]
            DBO[(orderdb)]
            DBW[(paymentdb)]
            DBU[(userdb)]
        end
    end

    BROWSER -->|HTTP JSON APIs| GATEWAY

    GATEWAY --> AUTH
    GATEWAY --> USER
    GATEWAY --> PRODUCT
    GATEWAY --> ORDER
    GATEWAY --> PAYMENT

GATEWAY --> AUTH
    GATEWAY --> USER
    GATEWAY --> PRODUCT
    GATEWAY --> ORDER
    GATEWAY --> PAYMENT

    AUTH --> DBA
    USER --> DBU
    PRODUCT --> DBP
    ORDER --> DBO
    PAYMENT --> DBW
